extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: I counted only the Against rows—criminal proceedings of 2 against the Directors, with Nil against the Company, Promoters and Subsidiaries; statutory/regulatory proceedings of 1 against the Company and 1 against the Directors, excluding tax; and tax proceedings of 17 against the Company plus 1 against Subsidiaries, excluding promoter/director personal tax matters and all By rows. For the company-and-subsidiary litigation amount, I used the stated aggregate amounts of ₹1,223.25 million against the Company and ₹0.23 million against Subsidiaries, totaling ₹1,223.48 million, or ₹122.348 crore; the Director and Promoter amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹501.47 million as of December 31, 2023, converted to ₹50.147 crore rather than re-summing line items. The concentration percentages disclosed concern Suppliers, not company-wide customers; therefore no top-five or top-ten customer revenue percentage is extracted. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
